title: palicourea mansoana
intro: Palicourea mansoana, also known as Manso's palicourea or palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids and other compounds that have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Palicourea mansoana is often prepared as an infusion or decoction by herbalists, who may use it to make teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
